hooks.command: $j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $fp = [string]$j.tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -and [System.IO.Path]::GetFileName($fp) -match '\.env$') { Write-Output '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Lectura de ficheros .env bloqueada por politica de seguridad"}}'; }
